name: R08 Access Bridge
summary: Use the R08 smart ring as a navigation controller for Rokid glasses
description: R08 Access Bridge pairs an R08 smart ring via Bluetooth LE to control Rokid glasses navigation. It translates ring input into launcher navigation, app focus movement, activation, and Back actions using an Accessibility Service.
author: Anezium

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
# About
R08 Access Bridge lets you use an R08 smart ring as a one-axis navigation controller for Rokid glasses. It pairs with the ring over Bluetooth LE and converts ring inputs into launcher navigation, app focus movement, activation, and Android Back actions.

# Key Features
- Connects or reconnects to an R08 ring via Bluetooth LE
- Default Stable mode emits media key events for reliable one-step launcher navigation
- Supports Fast mode with accelerated launcher swipes and Touch fallback mode
- Remap triple and quadruple tap actions directly from the glasses UI
- Provides an AppType probe screen for testing ring output modes
- Safe Forget R08 flow to remove Bluetooth bond and pair again

# Controls
- Forward/backward ring slides move launcher or app focus
- Single tap activates the focused item
- Double tap performs Android Back
- Triple and quadruple taps are configurable (default triple tap opens Rokid AI assistant)

# Requirements
- Rokid glasses with Android SDK 28+
- R08 smart ring with Bluetooth LE
- Accessibility permission enabled for R08 Access Bridge

# Notes
- Stable mode is recommended for most users
- Fast mode is for devices with stable visual focus alignment
- Touch fallback is for debugging or when media key input is unavailable
- Designed specifically for Rokid glasses HUD, not phone-first UI
